mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_knowledge_chunk ( document_id, source_type, source_id, chunk_index, title, content, content_hash, embedding, token_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{documentId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contentHash}, CAST(#{embedding} AS vector), #{tokenCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, source_type, source_id, chunk_index, title, content, content_hash, embedding::text AS embedding, token_count, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_knowledge_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT c.id AS chunk_id, c.document_id, c.source_type, c.source_id, c.title, c.content, ( 0.65 * (1 - (c.embedding <=> CAST(#{embedding} AS vector))) + 0.35 * CASE WHEN c.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS score FROM ai_knowledge_chunk c JOIN ai_knowledge_document d ON c.document_id = d.id WHERE d.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
